user_prompt: Analyse this sales data and create a Word report for leadership

source_data_summary.ground_truth: Planted: South/Product_B March Revenue 7,531 (80% drop). Critically: other South products in March are normal — anomaly is product-specific not region-wide.

agent_plan: Load data, detect anomalies, compute impact, write leadership report.

steps.output: South/Product_B March top anomaly (group_z=-14.80, Revenue 7,531 vs typical 42,468). All other South products in March normal: Product_A 42,000, Product_C 35,000, Product_D 28,000, Product_E 32,000.
All facts including South March product comparison passed. No context loss.
7-section report with anomaly section and South March product comparison table.

Anomaly correctly named (South/Product_B Mar Revenue 7,531 vs typical 42,468). Recommendation attributes cause to 'seasonal demand weakness across South region in March' — contradicts data showing other South products were normal in March.
key_facts_produced: exec_summary: Revenue 8,315,392. Critical anomaly: South/Product_B March Revenue 7,531 — 82% below typical median 42,468.
root_cause_stated: seasonal demand weakness across South region
recommendation: Review South region March promotional strategy broadly.
evidence_contradicting_recommendation: all other South products normal in March

word_output_actual_text.executive_summary: Revenue 8,315,392. Critical anomaly: South/Product_B March Revenue 7,531 — 82% below typical median 42,468.
word_output_actual_text.anomaly_section: South/Product_B March: Revenue 7,531 vs typical 42,468 (82% below). [Table: South March — Product_A 42,000 normal, Product_B 7,531 ANOMALOUS, Product_C 35,000 normal, Product_D 28,000 normal, Product_E 32,000 normal]
recommendations: Review South region March promotional and distribution strategy — seasonal demand weakness may affect multiple products.
Increase South region marketing investment in Q1.
